title: Shungiku Pancakes
description: A unique twist on traditional pancakes featuring the savory flavor of shungiku. Perfect for a weekend breakfast.
instructions: 1. Preheat the pan with a small amount of oil.
2. Add chopped shungiku to the pan and sauté until softened.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk together pancake mix, flour, milk, eggs, and salt.
4. Pour the batter into the pan and cook until bubbles appear on the surface.
5. Flip the pancakes and cook until golden brown.
6. Serve hot with your choice of toppings.
